title: Tensura:Angels
description: An addon for Tensura:Reincarnated that adds 3 different evolutionary lines for the Angel race.
body:
An addon for Tensura:Reincarnated that adds 3 different evolutionary lines for the Angel race.

The first one, the angel, starts you as a Lesser Angel, you need to gain EP to evolve further. From there, 3 paths are before you, you can choose to stay as a pure angel, or you can choose to fall from grace and become a Fallen Greater Angel, or a Field Operator from the mysterious Phantom race.

If you choose to stay as a pure angel, you will not be able to become a Demon Lord, and if you become a Fallen Angel, you will not be able to become a True Hero.

However, if you choose to take the third path, the path of the Phantoms, you will have the choice to become either a True Hero or a Demon Lord.

IMPORTANT: it is not recommended to begin as a Phantom.

The mods Tensura:Reincarnated 1.0.0.5 and Manascore 2.1.4.2 are required.
